bot_welcome:
👋 {name}, I'm LittleAnt AI Butler!

Chat with me or ask me to run tasks on your server.
Say "help me install xxx" to start a task.

/status - Task progress
/cancel - Cancel task
bot_help:
🐜 LittleAnt V14

Chat → send a message
Check status → "what's in crontab" "disk space"
Run task → "help me install nginx"

/status - Progress
/cancel - Cancel
confirm_task: Do you want me to execute "{task}" on the server?
edit_task_prompt: Please describe what you'd like to change:
risk_warning_medium: ⚠️ This task includes software installation and configuration changes.
risk_warning_high: ⚠️ This task includes high-risk operations (file deletion, permission changes). Please confirm you understand the risks.
auto_mode_start: ⚡ Auto-execution mode. I'll handle everything and report when done.
exec_start: OK, starting. I'll report when done.
exec_failed: ⚠️ Task failed. Want me to retry?
node_problem:
⚠️ Step "{name}" failed: {detail}
Reply "skip" to continue or "cancel" to stop.
busy: A task is running. Wait or /cancel.
unknown_msg: I didn't understand. Could you rephrase?
feedback_ask: Did this task meet your requirements?
feedback_ask_reason:
Thank you for your feedback. To help improve service quality, please describe what didn't meet your expectations.

Your specific feedback will directly improve how similar tasks are handled in the future.
feedback_saved: Feedback saved. We'll improve on this. Thank you! 🙏
